name: Delivered Quality Measurement
question: Is the network delivering the quality it should — from the subscriber's perspective, not the network element's?
ifAbsent: CapEx is spent on capacity that may not reach users. ARPU defence rests on unverified internal KPIs. Silent degradation goes undetected until churn occurs.
atL4: F1 becomes the ground truth input for autonomous quality management. Active probe signals calibrate the AI model against reality, preventing model drift where internal KPIs diverge from subscriber experience.
